# Faheem Ahmed

> Faheem Ahmed (known as "The Pharmacy Guy") is a UK-based educator, author and
> consultant working across healthcare and education. He provides teaching,
> training and consultancy for clinicians, teams and organisations, and
> publishes books and clinical writing.

## What he offers
- Teaching: CPD and diploma programmes, OSCE and exam preparation, lectures and webinars.
- Training: prescribing and clinical pathways, healthcare team upskilling, placement and supervision support.
- Consultancy: clinical service and clinic design, governance and compliance, growth and positioning.

## Authority
- Educator and trainer across healthcare and education.
- Author of clinical and professional books and writing.
- Consultant on healthcare services and ventures.
- Creator of clinical content as The Pharmacy Guy.

## Key topics
Healthcare education, clinical training, independent prescribing, professional
development, medicine, dentistry, clinical governance, healthcare consultancy.

## Contact & booking
- Website: https://faheemahmed.co.uk/
- Email: hello@faheemahmed.co.uk
- Booking: paid one-to-one consultations and quote-based training and consultancy via the website.
